data.title: APT predicted to reach $2.10 by Feb. Short-term target at $1.58-$1.64; Medium-term forecast of $1.64-$2.10. Critical support at $1.49.
data.description: Summary of APT Price Prediction: In the short term, the target price for APT is between $1.58 and $1.64 over the next week. data.title: WePlay, a social entertainment platform, expands to Times Square on Jan 18, 2026, marking a pivotal moment in social revolution.
data.description: In Istanbul on January 24, 2026, WePlay, a worldwide next-generation social entertainment platform, revealed that its brand logo has made its debut on Times Square in New York City since January 18. This significant event highlights the increasing pace of a social movement driven by the youth.

Market analysts predict a potential recovery for LTC, with estimates ranging between $72 to $80, supported by technical indicators indicating a likely bounce from the current support levels.

data.title: Ethereum establishes security team, plans biweekly quantum-resistant meetings; Foundation allocates $2M for stronger cryptography.
data.description: Developers of Ethereum will be introducing biweekly sessions to focus on creating transactions that are resistant to quantum computing. The Ethereum Foundation has pledged $2 million in additional funding towards enhancing the security of core cryptography in response to the threat posed by quantum technologies. These efforts underline the commitment of Ethereum to staying ahead of potential vulnerabilities and ensuring the longevity and security of its ecosystem.

data.title: By February 2026, BCH expected to reach $720-750. Short-term target: $610-620, bullish breakout at $607, critical support at $580.
data.description: Summary of BCH Price Predictions: In the short term, the target price for Bitcoin Cash (BCH) is estimated to be between $610 and $620 within a week. Looking ahead to the medium term, the forecast indicates a range of $720 to $750 over the course of a month. The level for a bullish breakout is set at $607, while a critical support level stands at $580. These figures provide insights into the potential trajectory of BCH in the near future.

data.title: Abitibi Metals reports 12.83% CuEq at B26, high-grade zone growing.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 24, 2026, Abitibi Metals Corp. announced a significant development in their exploration efforts. The company, listed on the CSE as AMQ, OTCQB as AMQFF, and FSE as FW0, revealed a recent high-grade copper-gold discovery from their Phase 3 drilling initiative at the B26 Polymetallic Deposit in Québec. This finding adds to their series of successful results and showcases their continued progress in the region.
